description_long: This delivery robot features a spherical mint-green body with a white lower half, adorned with a black top hat tilted to one side, giving it a whimsical appearance. It is equipped with two articulated mechanical arms, each ending in a pincer-like gripper, and a pair of sturdy, metallic legs for mobility. The rear of the robot sports a large, angular, fin-like tail, suggesting stability or directional control, and a small, flexible appendage with a claw is attached to the upper side. A gold chain detail and a stylized insignia are visible on the side, adding character. The robot's exterior appears to be primarily metal, with some plastic and rubber components for joints and grippers. Its design suggests it is intended for urban delivery tasks, combining functionality with a playful, eye-catching aesthetic.
description: A spherical, mint-green delivery robot with a black top hat, articulated arms with pincers, metallic legs, and a fin-like tail, designed for urban delivery tasks.
description_view_0: Front view shows the robot's spherical body, top hat, and both mechanical arms extended forward, with the insignia visible on the left side.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the large fin-like tail, one articulated arm with a pincer, and the flexible claw appendage on top.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the tail fin, the back of the top hat, and the gold chain detail, with both legs visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view reveals the other articulated arm, the flexible claw appendage, and the side of the spherical body.
